creator: tkjacobsen@gmail.com
text:
On Fri, 2010-06-25 at 19:30 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of graphics/ipe,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/148147 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/148147
> 

Thanks for the patch! However, I submitted an update for the port in
january,and will not spend more time on the port before this has been
either submitted or rejected with comments.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=143209

Best regards
Troels
